title: Generic Identity
description: Write reusable functions that can work with any data type while maintaining type relationships.
problemStatement:
The return-what-you-get function! Write a generic function `identity<T>(arg: T): T` that simply returns the argument it receives.

**Requirement:** The function must work correctly with both strings and numbers, preserving the exact type.
hints: Generics (using `<T>`) allow you to write code that works with types that aren't known yet.
expectedOutput: Values returned with original types intact
